message:
Merge PR #2762: fix(crew): set liveness env vars so non-Claude runtimes survive attach

Merge liveness-critical env vars (GT_AGENT, GT_PROCESS_NAMES) at session
creation and restart so IsAgentAlive can detect non-Claude runtimes.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2762
Author: xanterx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
